news.title: U.S. payrolls rose by 172,000 in May, much more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
news.summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 80,000 in May. The unemployment rate held at 4.3%. The economy is expected to grow by 0.3% in the second quarter.

news.title: Alphabet is seeking fresh capital as stock's 4-week losing streak tests investor appetite
news.summary: Alphabet expects capex to reach up to $190 billion this year, double last year's spending. The company is turning to investors to help fund its expansion.

news.title: Boeing to start 737 Max production on new assembly line July 6, CEO says
news.summary: The new 737 Max final assembly line in Everett, Washington, will serve as a catalyst for increasing Max production to 52 jets per month.

news.title: Lululemon cuts annual outlook, citing 'negative' media commentary and disappointing product launches
news.summary: Lululemon is expecting its situation to get a lot worse before it gets better. The company issued weak guidance for the full year.

news.title: No tech, no problem. Dow makes record and traders think these stocks can lead now
news.summary: Traders bought about 5,300 calls in the State Street Health Care Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLV) on Thursday, compared to just over 1,000 puts, according to ThinkOrSwim.

news.title: ‘DOGE’ wanted to declare 2.7 million people ‘dead’ at Social Security: whistleblower
news.summary: This is the third whistleblower to come forward about alleged illegal activity by Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency. This is also the third time a whistleblower has come forward with allegations of illegal activity.

news.title: California’s proposed ‘billionaire tax’ is a terrible idea. We should do this instead.
news.summary: Almost everything about this tax is bad, and it obscures something much better that we do need. Almost everything about it is bad. It obscures what we need. It's time to get rid of it.

news.title: Social Security is looking at a $500-a-month cut. Could a new bipartisan commission make a difference?
news.summary: A new legislative proposal would create a bipartisan commission to strengthen the finances of Social Security and Medicare. The proposal comes at a time when the programs are under pressure.

news.title: We thought we found the perfect luxury retirement community, but it’s millions of dollars in debt. Are we trapped?
news.summary: “If we were to leave, we would lose a portion of our buy-in — about $80,000,” he says.

news.title: J.P. Morgan ends bearish Tesla call that was predicting a 65% stock drop
news.summary: A new analyst has taken over the bank’s Tesla coverage, and he has a less gloomy view of the EV company. The new analyst is based in New York and has been with the bank for about a year.
